id: integer: the ID for this item

title.title: text: the title of the publication
title.acronym: text: a short-form for the title
title.language: value(two-letter language code): the language of this value

issns.type: value('print','electronic','legacy'): the type of the issn
issns.issn: text: the issn of the publication

type: value('journal', 'conference_proceedings', 'monographic_series'): the type of the publication
notes: text: notes about the publication record
url: URL: the url of the publication
listed_in_doaj: value('yes','no'): is the publication listed in DOAJ
tj_status: value('plan_s_approved','jisc_approved'): set when a publication is a transformative journal approved by Plan S and/or Jisc

publisher.id: integer: the ID of the publisher
publisher.name: text: the title of the publisher
issns: text: the ISSNs of the publisher
publisher.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the publisher
publisher.imprint_of_id: integer: the ID of the parent publisher
publisher.publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this publisher
publisher.country: value(two letter country code): the country of the publisher

publisher_policy.id: integer: the ID of the policy
publisher_policy.internal_moniker: text: internal moniker for the policy
publisher_policy.publication_count: integer: the number of publication records in open policy finder for this policy

permitted_oa.copyright_owner: text: the owner of the copyright
permitted_oa.additional_oa_fee: value('yes', 'no'): whether an additional OA fee is required
permitted_oa.id: integer: the ID of the permitted OA

additional_oa_fee_phrases.phrase: text: the additional OA fee phrase
additional_oa_fee_phrases.value: text: the additional OA fee value

urls.description: text: description of the document linked to
urls.url: URL: the address of the document

publisher_policy.open_access_prohibited: value('yes', 'no'): whether open access is prohibited
publisher_policy.uri: URL: the address within open policy finder of the policy
